title: PHP Global and Static Keywords
codeExample:
<?php
function getNextId() {
    static $id = 0;
    return ++$id;
}

echo getNextId(); // 1
echo getNextId(); // 2
echo getNextId(); // 3

// Global example
$appName = "MyApp";

function getAppName() {
    global $appName;
    return $appName;
}

echo getAppName(); // MyApp
?>

quiz.question: When is a static variable initialized?
Does a static variable retain its value between function calls?
